nodes.title: Display Custom Screens List
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/custom-screens page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/custom-screens and display screens as cards. Each card shows screen name, description, and tab count. Clicking a card opens the screen view.

nodes.title: Create Custom Screen
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إضافة شاشة' and fills form with {name, description, tabs[]}, triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/custom-screens. Tab configuration includes type (operations, monitoring, summary) and linked resources. Success: refreshes list.

nodes.title: Render Custom Screen Tabs
nodes.description: When user opens a custom screen, render tab navigation at top. Each tab displays its configured content: operations tab shows linked operation types, monitoring tab shows account balances, summary tab shows aggregated data. Tab switching is instant without page reload.
